calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion By Pltfs Paul Knieser And Charles Ulm For Default Judgment Against All Defendants
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Cathy Mosbrucker, Esq., and Mary Jane Foran, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, PAUL KNIESER and CHARLES ULM.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement (Plaintiff Charles Ulm) of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JOEHLEEN ARCHARD, JOHN GAVIN, ANGUS GAVIN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Paul Knieser sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $288,947.79
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $10,837.50
Costs: $984.55
Total Judgment in the amount of $300,769.84
Judgment signed in open court.
